The Residence

Where Design Meets an Effortless Lifestyle

From the moment you step inside, an exceptionally bright atmosphere greets you — large windows invite an abundance of natural light to illuminate the modern interior, while palm tree canopy views frame every window like a living painting.

This unit features several designer updates: long plank ceramic wood floors throughout, updated kitchen and bathrooms, and a spacious open layout that invites many configurations to suit your creative or professional lifestyle. Mid-century furnishings feel right at home against the warm, textured backdrop — a space curated for someone who values both form and function.

Fitness

Your Gym, Downstairs

No excuses. The on-site fitness center is stocked with TRUE treadmills, ellipticals, cable machines, stability balls, and free weights — everything you need to maintain your routine without leaving the building.

The Neighborhood

Sans Souci Boulevard perfectly reflects the vibe of this vibrant pocket of North Miami. You're positioned between the world-class shopping and pristine beaches of Bal Harbour and Surfside to the east, and the arts and dining scenes of Wynwood and Downtown to the south. North Miami itself has quietly become one of the area's best foodie neighborhoods — a diverse selection of acclaimed restaurants from Haitian to Japanese to Venezuelan. This is the kind of neighborhood where you discover your new favorite spot on foot, grab groceries next door, and still make it to the beach in five minutes.
